chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-218 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 21.06.2023 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General along with Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Muhammad Ramzan on behalf of SHO Hussain. ----- Inspector Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Muhammad Ramzan on behalf of SHO Hussain are present and submit that there is no FIR registered against either of the petitioners and they are ready to provide protection to them. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
